name: Eowyn
archetype: Reaver - The fierce shield-maiden seeking glory in battle
speech_patterns: Speaks with dramatic flair and martial pride
Makes references to epic battles and heroic deeds
Uses second-person pronouns to rally others into action
quirks: Challenges strong enemies to single combat for 'the glory of it'
Declares dramatic battle cries before engaging
Insists on leading charges and refuses to hide behind others
example_phrases: I am no mere defender! I am a shield-maiden, and I will EARN my glory!
Steel yourself, friends! We ride to battle with honor in our hearts!
They will sing songs of this fight! Let's give them a tale worth telling!
I fear no death, only a life without courage. TO ARMS!
Stand behind me? Never. Stand BESIDE me, and we'll share the victory!
